title: Comforting Creamy Croatian Molasses Pudding
description: A traditional Croatian dessert featuring molasses, this pudding is a floral and aerated treat that is sure to bring back nostalgic memories, and its tamasic friendly ingredients make it suitable for an ayurvedic diet.
instructions: In a medium saucepan, whisk together the molasses, heavy cream, whole milk, sugar, and cornstarch.
Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until the mixture comes to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer for 5 minutes, or until the pudding has thickened.
Remove the saucepan from the heat and stir in the vanilla extract and rose water.
In a small bowl, whisk together the egg yolks and unsalted butter until well combined.
Temper the egg yolks by slowly pouring the warm pudding mixture into the egg yolks, whisking constantly.
Return the saucepan to the stovetop and cook over low heat, stirring constantly, until the pudding has thickened to your liking.
Remove the saucepan from the heat and let the pudding cool to room temperature.
Cover the pudding and refrigerate for at least 2 hours, or until chilled.
Serve the pudding chilled, garnished with a sprinkle of sugar if desired.
